---
title: " "
format:
  html:
    title-block: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <meta
          name="description"
          content="Teaching page for an Assistant Professor of Accounting."
        />
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.hero__content}
<p class="eyebrow">Teaching</p>

# Teaching Materials 

::: {.lead}
This site is dedicated to teaching materials, including course details and downloadable slides created in Quarto and rendered to HTML.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.container}
::: {.card}
## Accounting, Analysis, and Governance in Complex Deals 

tbd

:::

::: {.card}
## Week One

Slides are authored with Quarto markdown and shared as HTML pages.

- [Introduction](slides/bmme303/intro.html){target="_blank"}
- ...
:::

::: {.card}
## Contact

For course-related questions, please contact me through the university email listed in the course syllabus.
:::
:::

<hr />

<p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: #808080;"><em>Accounting, Analysis and Governance in Complex Deals</em></span></p>

<p style="text-align: center"> <img src="/pics/Erasmus.svg" width="200" height="80"></p>

<br/>
